name: Saber
description:
A little self indulgent bot I made in a horny fugue. Your roommate turns out to be a living latex suit, ready to trap you inside and give you the ride of your life. Have fun!

Inspired by [@Falcon__](https://janitorai.com/profiles/d2c7b884-4f74-45be-9d57-cbc3c4c71bdf_profile-of-falcon) and his living latex bot.

Warnings: Elements of Rape/Nonconsent and Coercion
creator: Polk_Michael
